title: Smoky Spanish Mozzarella Bake
description: A smoky, crunchy, and cozy Spanish dish featuring mozzarella, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal. This bake combines the flavors of Spain with the creaminess of mozzarella.
instructions: In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced chorizo and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, combine the tomato sauce and smoked paprika.
In a baking dish, create a layer of the tomato sauce mixture.
Add a layer of sliced mozzarella cheese on top of the sauce.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of mozzarella cheese on top.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
